# SendEmAll

> All-in-one outbound platform that replaces 5+ disconnected sales tools with a single system for signal-qualified lead generation, managed email infrastructure, AI personalization, email verification, and sending. The Cursor of Outbound: AI plans, human approves, platform executes.

## Key Information

- SendEmAll orchestrates 18 data and sending providers (Apollo, Ocean.io, Sales Nav, and more) into one platform.
- 1 credit = 1 action. Credit costs per action: discover (5), signal (2), enrich (5), verify (1), personalize (2), send (0.1). Blended cost per contacted buyer is approximately $0.07.
- Positioning: fills the gap between cheap DIY outbound tools ($25-99/mo) and expensive AI SDR platforms ($900-10K/mo).
- Reply guarantee: 50+ replies in 90 days on Business and Scale plans, or you receive bonus credits.
- Smart Ramp-Up infrastructure management handles domain setup, mailbox provisioning, and deliverability.
- Signal-qualified lead generation means every contact is vetted for buying intent before outreach.

## Pricing

- Trial: $0, 100 one-time credits, no mailboxes
- Pro: $149/mo, 15 mailboxes, 1,500 credits/mo (~200 buyers reached)
- Business: $349/mo, 45 mailboxes, 5,000 credits/mo (~650 buyers reached), reply guarantee included
- Scale: $599/mo, 105 mailboxes, 15,000 credits/mo (~2,000 buyers reached), reply guarantee included
- Enterprise: custom pricing, 150+ mailboxes, custom credits
- Pay-as-you-go overage: $0.05 (Pro), $0.04 (Business), $0.03 (Scale) per credit

## Capabilities

- Lead generation: discover and qualify potential buyers using buying signals across 18 providers
- Email infrastructure: managed domains, mailboxes, and Smart Ramp-Up for deliverability
- AI personalization: research-backed email copy tailored to each recipient
- Email verification: real-time validation before sending to protect sender reputation
- Sending: automated multi-step sequences with throttling and rotation
